name: disabling a source rule in ctp.config.yaml clears it at BOTH write-time and audit-time (auto-discovered, both entrypoints)
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf 'const apiKey = "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"
' > repo/app.js && printf 'name: c
extends: [standard]
rules:
  g-universal-no-hardcoded-secrets: off
' > repo/ctp.config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file repo/app.js 2>w.txt; wc=$?; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo 2>a.txt; ac=$?; [ "$wc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'disabled=1' w.txt && [ "$ac" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' a.txt && echo config-clears-both-phases 1>&2
